description:
Advances: specled.evidence_store, specled.mix_tasks

Deliverable:
1. SpecLedEx.Evidence.TreeHash (lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex): current-tree key mirrors `git add -A` — temp index seeded from HEAD (git read-tree HEAD under a unique per-invocation GIT_INDEX_FILE temp path), `git add -A` into that index, `git write-tree`. Base keys: `git rev-parse <ref>^{tree}`. `--end-of-options` hardening on interpolated refs (new call sites only).
2. SpecLedEx.Evidence.Entry (lib/specled_ex/evidence/entry.ex): canonical-JSON entry per the pinned format — {schema_version: 1, tree_hash, run_at (ISO-8601 UTC microsecond), run_id (32-hex random), specled_version, verification: {cover_id -> {strength, meets_minimum}}, findings: [...]} with findings in the exact normalized shape SpecLedEx.normalize_for_state/1 writes today (entity_id/level) so FindingsDelta's signature function is untouched. Lexicographic (run_at, run_id) comparison; filename regex ^[0-9a-f]{40,64}\.json$ validated on read. Serialize via the existing SpecLedEx.Json canonical writer.
3. SpecLedEx.Evidence.Store (lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex), local-only by module contract (zero network; Sync in S3 is the only network surface): read(root, tree_hash) via git cat-file (:absent when ref/entry missing); record(root, entry) building the new evidence tree via hash-object -w + temp-index update-index --cacheinfo + write-tree, then commit-tree, then CAS `update-ref refs/heads/spec-evidence <new> <expected>` with 5 attempts, 50ms x attempt linear backoff +/-50% jitter; on exhaustion named evidence/local_write_failed warning, caller exit unaffected. Local same-key re-run applies highest-run-stamp-wins (identical rule to the S3 sync merge). Self-creates the orphan ref (parentless commit-tree) when absent. Never checks anything out; plumbing only.
4. mix spec.check integration: after verification report + branch guard complete, build the entry (per-cover outcomes + findings list) and Store.record/2. Write failure = named warning, exit status unaffected. Task moduledoc documents the ref-write side effect and zero-network guarantee.
5. Spec work: .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md ALREADY AUTHORED at distill (status: draft) — flip status to active if repo convention requires, flip the S2 verification stub (write-path group + attestation group) execute:false->true as tests land, amend if implementation forces requirement changes (via ADR). Amend mix_tasks.spec.md for the check-run evidence write.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs, entry_test.exs, store_test.exs; updated test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs. Flip evidence_store stubs: write-path group (tree_hash_mirrors_add_all, per_entry_isolation, run_stamp_wins, local_cas_bounded, self_create, local_only_write_path) and attestation group (attestation_never_gates).
- Behaviors to demonstrate (scenario IDs from evidence_store.spec.md): scenario.check_key_equals_commit_tree (entry key equals ^{tree} of `git add -A && git commit` from same working-tree state, untracked non-ignored file included, ignored file excluded, ref self-created); scenario.entry_is_isolated_canonical_json; scenario.same_key_higher_stamp_replaces (constructed stamps, no wall-clock races); scenario.concurrent_local_writers_both_survive (pre-move the ref between read and update -> CAS retry preserves both entries); scenario.check_offline_write_failure_never_gates; scenario.evidence_never_gates.
- Verification cadence:
  - Iteration tier: compile-graph-scoped checks only (mix test --stale or named files) plus mix spec.check --no-run-commands.
  - Final tier: full merge-gate suite run-until-green before IMPLEMENTED.
  - Verifier tier: flipped stubs + targeted/--stale only; no full suite.
- Standing bounce-class checks:
  - Production call site named for each new callable surface, with proving test on that production path
  - Fixture hygiene: tmp git repos + GIT_INDEX_FILE temp paths cleaned up; no cross-test leakage
  - Spec surfaces fresh for every touched callable/config surface
  - Every conditional clause covered by a test (CAS retry branches, self-create branch, absent-ref read)
- Call-site Integration: Evidence.Store.record/2 called from Mix.Tasks.Spec.Check.run/1 after gate completion (production caller); proven by spec_check_test.exs running the task in a tmp git repo and asserting ref + entry + `git add -A` tree equivalence end-to-end.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/sync.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.sync.ex, lib/mix/tasks/spec.prune.ex (S3)
- lib/specled_ex/review/** (S4)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.*, priv/hooks/** (S5)
- lib/specled_ex/base_view.ex, lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex (S1, done)
- docs/**, priv/spec_init/**, skills/**, .gitignore
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/entry.ex
- lib/specled_ex/evidence/store.ex
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex
- test/specled_ex/evidence/tree_hash_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/evidence/entry_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/evidence/store_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_check_test.exs
- .spec/specs/evidence_store.spec.md (stub flips execute:false->true; status flip; amendments only via ADR)
- .spec/specs/mix_tasks.spec.md (check-run evidence-write amendment + stub flips)
- .spec/state.json, .spec/realization_hashes.json (tool-managed regen — NOT scope creep)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Zero network I/O anywhere in this stage's code paths — no fetch, no push, no auto-sync.
- spec.check still writes state.json (removed in S5); do not touch that write path.
- No consumer reads evidence yet (S4). No hook, no migration.
- Evidence write failure must never affect spec.check exit status.
- No timing-based assertions: run-stamp tests use constructed stamps (fixtures), never raced DateTime.utc_now() calls.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check; adjudicate against S1 baseline note)
- [ ] mix format --check-formatted; mix deps.unlock --check-unused
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S2: Local evidence store + spec.check write path
